finding: Temp validator fixtures copied historical `docs/tasks/*.task.md` cards from the framework repo into fresh bootstrap repos without also copying the matching `.atm/history/task-events` ledger, so task audit raised false `ATM_TASK_AUDIT_TRANSITION_EVENT_MISSING` findings unrelated to the hook regression being tested.
expectedBehavior: Source-first validator fixtures that bootstrap a fresh `.atm` runtime should either copy a consistent historical task/evidence/event set or explicitly drop inherited historical task cards before running task audit sensitive commands.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced on 2026-06-28 while debugging `scripts/validate-framework-governance-repairs.ts`: after worktree-local `git-head` backfill, `hook pre-push` no longer reported `ATM_COMMIT_RANGE_GIT_HEAD_EVIDENCE_MISSING`, but still failed on orphaned `TASK-AAO-0146` transition history because the temp repo included `docs/tasks/TASK-AAO-0146-*.task.md` without the corresponding `.atm/history/task-events/...` files. The shared fixture layer landed in `c589f125049ad81adc146f1b78e6a5ee36b8f607` via `schemas/validators/validator-fixture.schema.json`, `scripts/lib/validator-fixture.ts`, and fixture-backed validator rewrites.
followUp: Keep fixture hygiene in the shared validator fixture schema/helper, preserve the focused regression for worktree-local backfill, and treat future task-audit failures in temp repos as fixture-consistency issues first.
